'''Andras Pell''' was the husband of [[Akanah Norand Goss Pell|Akanah Norand Goss]], despite the fact that he was thirty-six [[Standard year/Legends|years]] older than her. A year after their [[Marriage/Legends|marriage]], he died and she inherited his [[Starship/Legends|ship]], a [[Adventurer|Verpine Adventurer]].
